name: Preet Bharara
role: U.S. Attorney for Southern District of New York
summary: Former U.S. Attorney who was fired by Trump after refusing to resign and later warned that Trump's attacks on institutions are authoritarian in nature.

keyStatements.quote: The thing that concerns me the most is the attack on institutions... These attacks are authoritarian in nature.
keyStatements.context: Interview about attacks on DOJ, FBI, judiciary, and press

keyStatements.quote: What we're seeing is unprecedented. A president who believes he is above the law.
I think Donald Trump's unfitness for office is manifest.

timeline.significance: Dismissed day after refusing to resign

timeline.event: Host of 'Stay Tuned with Preet' podcast
timeline.significance: Commentator on Trump and rule of law

credibility.background: Former U.S. Attorney for Southern District of New York, renowned prosecutor
positions: U.S. Attorney, Southern District of New York (2009-2017)
Chief Counsel, U.S. Senate Judiciary Committee (2005-2009)

oppositionReasons: Said attacks on institutions are authoritarian
Said Trump believed he was above the law
Said Trump's unfitness for office was manifest

sources.title: Preet Bharara: Attacks on institutions are authoritarian
Preet Bharara on Mueller report and rule of law
Preet Bharara: Trump’s unfitness for office is manifest
